subcodes.first_line: O thou who art voicing the praises of thy Lord! I have read thy letter, wherein thou didst express astonishment
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الناطقه بالثناء علی الله انی قرئت نمیقتک الناطقه بتحیرک فی بعض الاحکام
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @law of transformation and change, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
